summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CRM application with Airtable-like functionality. All major components working correctly including CustomerDetailCard, CustomerEditModal, CreatableSelect, and ImportModal.
passed_tests: Customers page loads with all header buttons (Backup, Cloud, Import, Add Company)
Customer table displays data correctly with 2 customer rows
Customer row click opens CustomerDetailCard successfully
CustomerDetailCard shows all required buttons (View Visits, Add Visit, Contacts, Edit)
CustomerDetailCard has View Details and Visits tabs working
Edit button opens CustomerEditModal with pre-filled customer data
Add Company button opens CustomerEditModal for new customer with empty form
CreatableSelect components show existing options in dropdown
CreatableSelect allows typing and searching functionality
CreatableSelect shows 'Add' option for new values (Airtable-like behavior)
Import modal opens and displays CSV format instructions
Sample data loading works in import modal
All form fields and inputs are properly accessible with data-testids
Modal opening and closing functionality works properly
